title: The Thin Yellow Line
posterAlt: The Thin Yellow Line (2015) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Five men are hired to paint the yellow line the road between two villages in Mexico forgotten. Aboard an old pickup truck, initiated the work of more than two hundred kilometers of asphalt and yellow paint to be completed in less than a fortnight
synopsis: The Thin Yellow Line (2015) is a drama film in Spanish. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
